rationale: Intake is thorough with all seven dimensions captured. Regulatory baseline is exceptionally detailed (14 frameworks across UK/EU/US) with hypothesis-confirm pattern. Geographic, stakeholder, risk appetite, recurring matters, and open notes all match seed depth. Industry dimension is thin on sub_sector (null) and missing business_model — the transcript establishes 'B2B payments SaaS' as sector but 'Subscription SaaS' business model was never captured. One load-bearing dimension gap.
specific_gaps: Industry: business_model (Subscription SaaS) not captured — transcript never specified SaaS model type, only 'B2B payments SaaS' as sector and 'mid-market' for size
